description_long: This object is a round pizza with a golden-brown crust, topped with a generous layer of melted cheese and evenly distributed pepperoni slices. The pizza is housed in an octagonal cardboard box, which features a decorative pattern on the lid in shades of orange and white. The box is partially open, revealing a single pizza slice being lifted, exposing the gooey cheese and toppings. The pizza appears to be freshly baked, with a slightly raised, hand-tossed style crust. The box is sturdy and designed for takeout or delivery, typical for urban food service. No visible brand logo is present on the box or pizza.
description: A pepperoni pizza with melted cheese in an octagonal patterned cardboard box, with one slice being lifted and the box partially open.
description_view_0: The pizza box is mostly closed, with the patterned lid covering most of the pizza, but the edge of the pizza and some toppings are visible.
description_view_1: The box lid is lifted, clearly showing the pizza inside with a slice being removed, revealing the toppings and crust.
description_view_2: A similar view to view 1 but from the opposite side, showing the pizza with a slice being lifted and more of the pizza surface visible.
description_view_3: The box lid is mostly off to the side, exposing the pizza almost entirely, with the patterned lid visible and the pizza's toppings and crust in clear view.
